# Getting support

docolin is pre-alpha and built by a small group of people. Here is where to go:

- **Bug reports and feature requests**: open an [issue](https://github.com/docolin-dev/docolin/issues) on this repository.
- **Questions, ideas, or general feedback**: email **hello@docolin.com**, or open a [discussion](https://github.com/docolin-dev/docolin/discussions) if one is enabled.
- **Help using docolin**: email **support@docolin.com**.
- **Security vulnerabilities**: see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md). Do not report security issues via email aliases above or in public issues.

All email addresses are hosted on Proton Mail, so end-to-end encryption is supported (Proton-to-Proton, or PGP / password-protected mail from other providers).
